LanguageData.VFEFactory_DroneAutofactory.label: drone autofactory
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DroneAutofactory.description: A fully automated assembly line capable of mass-producing various drone types. While requiring substantial power and cooling, it operates much faster than manual construction.\n\nFactory buildings need factory hoppers for input and output. They produce significant heat and consume much power, but can be overclocked for higher efficiency, increasing both heat generation and power consumption. Needs to be constructed on factory floor.
